# Electrospinning

**Summary**: A method used to produce nanofibers from a polymer solution.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] used electrospinning to fabricate a nanoparticle-embedded membrane for filtration.
